bottleneck_analysis.bottleneck: Rack uplink contention on InfiniBand NDR800 fabric.
bottleneck_analysis.description: Each rack provides four 800 GB/s uplinks (3.2 TB/s total) for 64 GPUs. During cross-rack data exchange, simultaneous transmission from all nodes saturates uplinks, creating transient congestion despite NDR800’s doubled per-link bandwidth compared to Hopper’s NDR400.
bottleneck_analysis.workload_characteristic: Cross-rack collectives in MoE or pipeline-parallel models where inter-rack activation transfers peak simultaneously.

sources: DGX B100 System Power & Cooling Whitepaper (2024)
